mentions.note: Simplifying to pure-play Texas growth utility; $65B+ capex plan, 3% rate increase, 7–9% EPS growth, 2.8% yield. Capital appreciation + income.

Early LNG developer (Louisiana export facility); selling majority infrastructure stake to KKR. Becoming regulated utility with some LNG upside. Still like it but better pure plays exist (Cheniere, Venture Global).
CEO Jeff Martin: data centers integrated without significantly raising electricity costs in Texas. Rates stable despite build-out.
